hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.subtitle: Building elite digital interfaces, server-connected interfaces, and fluid user experiences designed for modern businesses.

narrative.title: Frontend Engineer
narrative.slide2_text: Asking questions is important! Building isn't hard, knowing what and how to build is.
narrative.slide3_text: Yes AI can code and refactor. But can it think for us? Testing and Developing only what's needed.
narrative.slide4_text: Change is part of building. Building workflows, code, and processes that expect change.
narrative.slide4_cta: Do we need code..? or solutions?
narrative.slide5_text: Change is part of building. Building workflows, code and processes that expect change.
narrative.slide6_text: Adapting to the pace of development environments. Sounds Interesting?
narrative.slide6_cta: You be the perception, I'll be the tool

about.heading: About Me
about.sub_heading: Based in Dushanbe, passionate about engineering ultra-responsive, highly functional UI designs.
about.bio: Hello! I'm Rahmatsho Muhammad, a dedicated Frontend Engineer based in Dushanbe. I specialize in crafting high-end, responsive web applications with modular and solid architectural foundations. I value semantic clarity, fluid interactive craft, and highly organized code standards.
about.philosophy_val: Rigorous step-by-step feature assembly matched with thorough checkpoint verifications to guarantee clean design and performance integrity.

projects.sub_heading: A curated showcase of recent engineering craft, featuring clean code and robust systems.
